title: Time Vortex (TARDIS)
description: Embark on a journey through time and space with this survival-focused TARDIS mod. Designed for NeoForge 1.21.1, it offers a balanced and immersive approach to piloting your very own space-time machine.
body:
This mod introduces a fully functional TARDIS that requires careful piloting and resource management. unlike other instant-teleportation mods, the Time Vortex Mod emphasizes the journey itself. You'll need to manage your TARDIS's energy, navigate through the vortex using coordinate systems, and master the art of materialization.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive Flight:** Pilot your TARDIS through the time vortex with a hands-on manual flight system.
*   **Coordinate Travel:** Input target coordinates and dimensions to explore the furthest reaches of your world.
*   **Survival Balance:** designed to integrate seamlessly with survival mode, offering powerful travel capabilities that must be earned and maintained.
*   **Customization:** Personalize your TARDIS interior and exterior to suit your style.

### Credits

This project is a fork and port of the original _Time Vortex Mod_. **Original Creators:** [Plaaasma](https://www.curseforge.com/members/plaaasma) and [Moriz](https://www.curseforge.com/members/moriz)

We have built upon their foundational work to bring this experience to the latest Minecraft versions, ensuring their innovative vision for balanced time travel continues to thrive in NeoForge
